metadata.notable_clients: Hundred Acre, Lail Vineyards, Dana Estates, Bryant Family
metadata.background: Bordeaux-bred, formerly at Dominus Estate, Château Haut-Brion

metadata.style: Limited production wines emphasizing elegance, structure, power and finesse
metadata.sourcing: Multiple Napa Valley vineyard sources including Soda Canyon, Coombsville (Caldwell Vineyard), Atlas Peak, Pritchard Hill (Montagna Vineyard), Howell Mountain, St. Helena, To Kalon, Diamond Mountain, Yountville, Bald Mountain, Palisades (Calistoga)
metadata.oak_coopers: St. Martin, Taransaud, Ermitage, Baron, François Frères, Billon, Marcel Cadet, Rousseau, Dargaud et Jaegle, Damy

wines.name: Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.grapes_note: Blend varies by vintage: typically Cabernet Sauvignon dominant with Merlot, Petit Verdot, and/or Cabernet Franc

metadata.winemaking: Fermented in stainless steel tanks, 3-day cold soak, 21 days on skins. Extended aging 26 months in 100% new French oak.

metadata.vineyard_details: South-facing vineyard at nearly 1,600 feet, neighbor of Mount Veeder

metadata.vineyard_details: 30-year-old Chardonnay vines on deep Gold Ridge Sandy Loam top-soils near the rocky Sonoma County coastline. Pacific fog nightly during growing season.
Historic vineyard below the high cliffs of the Palisades in a narrow riparian canyon, one mile north of Calistoga. Petite Sirah dominant since vineyards developed by Domenico Barberis in 1915.

vintages.grapes_note: Data not available on website for this vintage

metadata.note: Vintage exists but technical details not published on website

wines.name: Black List
wines.grapes_note: Blend varies dramatically by vintage - sometimes 100% Cabernet Sauvignon, sometimes Petit Verdot or Cabernet Franc dominant. Each vintage has a Roman numeral designation.

metadata.tier: Black List allocation only - experimental/special bottlings

metadata.vineyard_sources: Diamond Mountain, Howell Mountain, St. Helena

wines.name: Paige Cuvee
wines.grapes_note: 100% Pinot Noir in most vintages; 2021 is 100% Chardonnay (anomaly). Part of the Limited Edition Sisters' Series.

metadata.note: This vintage is a Chardonnay, not Pinot Noir
Shares LTD series code with Paige Cuvee - appears to be a new naming within the Sisters' Series

metadata.vineyard_sources: Our Lady of Guadalupe (OLG), Santa Rita Hills

_extraction_metadata.method: AJAX API /include/wine-lookup.php with series codes NVCS, CL, HMHB, NVCH, SCCH, LTD, PSPV, BL + leonidas.moonetsai.com + accolades page
notes: Pricing requires authenticated account - not available
Wine-Searcher and CellarTracker blocked automated access (403/405)
Winemaker: Philippe Melka (Bordeaux-bred, formerly Dominus, Hundred Acre, Bryant Family, Dana Estates)
2018 Black List scored as XXIV on accolades page but XXVII on wine page - likely accolades page error, XXVII used
LTD series contains multiple sub-wines: Paige Cuvee (Pinot Noir/Chardonnay) and Corinne Cuvee (Pinot Noir)
SCCH 2019 returned data but with no technical details beyond varietal and vineyard
PSPV 2018 returned data but with no technical details
HMHB 2021 vintage for score (95+ Robert Parker) not found on website - may be unreleased
